chapter_title.ar: باب الْقَوْلِ عِنْدَ الْبَاهِ وَ مَا يَعْصِمُ مِنْ مُشَارَكَةِ الشَّيْطَانِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 141 – The words during approaching the wife and what safeguards from the participation of the Satan<sup>la</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/314)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/314)
text: النُّطْفَتَيْنِ اللَّتَيْنِ لِلْآدَمِيِّ وَ الشَّيْطَانِ إِذَا اشْتَرَكَا فَقَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) رُبَّمَا خُلِقَ مِنْ أَحَدِهِمَا وَ رُبَّمَا خُلِقَ مِنْهُمَا جَمِيعاً .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Hisham Bin Salim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the two seeds which are for the human being and the Satan<sup>la</sup>, when they are participated together. So Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Sometimes the creation is from one of the two, sometimes the creation is from both of them together’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Hisham ibn Salim who has said the following: “About the case of the seeds which are from man and Satan when they share, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Perhaps it is created from one of them or perhaps from both of them together.’”
